tasks.title: Create CLI entrypoint, argv parser, and output abstraction
tasks.notes: Created src/cli/types.ts, parse.ts, output.ts, run.ts, index.ts. Added bin field and cli script to package.json. Added coverage exclusion for src/cli/index.ts in jest.config.ts. Build compiles clean; lint passes.

tasks.title: Foundation tests
tasks.notes: Created tests/cli-parse.test.ts (12 tests for parseArgs) and tests/cli-run.test.ts (6 tests for run() with stdout/stderr spies). All 39 tests pass.

tasks.title: Implement and test --version
tasks.notes: Edited src/cli/run.ts to handle --version and -v flags with version sourced from package.json. Created tests/cli-version.test.ts with 4 test cases. All 43 tests pass, lint clean, build succeeds.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: Verified: --version/v flags exit 0, print exact string 'fleet-e2e-toy v1.0.0', JSON variant valid, precedence over subcommands works, version sourced from package.json. Manual tests pass. Build clean, lint pass, all 43 tests pass.

tasks.title: Temp-file registry + JSON output mode wiring

phases.title: SIGINT handling + JSON output mode (gh-toy-69s P2, gh-toy-aqd P2)
